name: LINE Seed JP
text:
https://github.com/line/seed (release v20251119)

Fetched at build time by scripts/fetch-fonts.sh and embedded into the
gemelli-gui binary via include_bytes! (crates/gui/src/fonts.rs).

Licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1. The full license text
is written to vendor/fonts/LICENSE by scripts/fetch-fonts.sh at fetch time;
it is not committed to this repository (vendor/fonts/ is gitignored).

"LINE" is a trademark of LY Corporation. This notice does not grant any
rights to that trademark.

name: Spout2 SDK
text:
https://github.com/leadedge/Spout2 (release 2.007.017)

Fetched at build time by scripts/fetch-spout.sh into vendor/Spout2/ and compiled
into the gemelli-spout crate (Windows only) via crates/spout/build.rs. The full
license text is written to vendor/Spout2/LICENSE by the fetch script; it is not
committed to this repository (vendor/Spout2/ is gitignored).
